name: Pflaumenkuchen (Plum Cake)
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Purple Plums (the small ones) approximately
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a dough using the first six ingredients.
2. Press the dough into a cookie sheet, forming a rim.
3. Spread a thin layer of peach or apricot jam over the top of the dough.
4. Arrange the quartered plums in rows on the dough.
5. Beat the egg whites slightly and brush them over the plums.
6. Sprinkle two tablespoons of flour over the beaten egg whites.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
8. If too sour, sprinkle powdered sugar on top before serving.
This can also be made in the winter by substituting apples for the plums.
